next_handler.name: Finnn AI
next_handler.context: Stable cut v0.8.4. Sixth stable in one day. Wave 4 ships full PandaDoc API coverage (122 raw endpoints + 5 quote workflows, 127 tools total) plus a housekeeping pass (33 new tests) plus 3 hot-fixes caught during cold-load testing (missing 'import re', closure-scope InvalidSignature, async createDocument 409 race). Tool count moves 263 → 390. Live-verified end-to-end against the operator's real PandaDoc account (test doc hWCZTpz6GwY6dNSnHhbHa2 — safe to ignore or delete). Push to GitHub at tag v0.8.4.

focus_area: Wave 4 — PandaDoc API integration + housekeeping + cold-load hot-fixes

tests.total_target: ~1595 (1293 baseline + ~170 Wave 1-3 + ~30 Patch ABC + ~30 Patch EFG + ~52 Wave 4 + ~33 housekeeping)
tests.note: Run locally to verify; sandbox can't reach venv.

open_tasks.summary: Workday Supplier Invoice EIB exporter — gated on GL → Spend Category map from Workday config (col 113 of Submit_Supplier_Invoice_v39.1).
open_tasks.blocker: Need the GL → Spend Category mapping table from Workday.

open_tasks.summary: Wire project_router._geotab_tiebreaker when GEOTAB_* credentials land in config.json.
Quote management module + e-signature wire-up. Operator deciding between PandaDoc (custom MCP, ~$19/user/mo, has proposal builder) and SignNow (in registry, ~$8/user/mo, e-sign only).
Slack integration — parity with chat_* surface. Joshua deferred until real need surfaces.

recent_changes_summary: v0.8.3 stable cut — Finnn EFG patches (cron cadence + AR collections kill-switch + upgrade fixes).
Housekeeping (1d8c69b): README/INSTALL/pyproject tool counts refreshed 263 / 14 categories. 4 broad excepts narrowed (149 → 145).
Tests for ar_send + ap_tree (c350009): 33 new unit tests — invoice/reminder renderers, send_invoice paths, AP-6 forced-tree filing.
PandaDoc Wave 4 foundation (f8d8d0e): pandadoc_client.py (448 LOC) + scripts/generate_pandadoc_tools.py + pandadoc_operations.py + config.pandadoc block.
PandaDoc Wave 4 raw tools (88c4572): 122 generated tools across 6 modules covering every operation in the v7.24.0 OpenAPI spec.
PandaDoc Wave 4 workflows (485516f): 5 operator workflows (send_quote, signature_status, quote_pipeline, quote_to_invoice, resend_quote) + register wiring.
PandaDoc Wave 4 tests + docs (2364eca): 19 client tests + tool count refresh 263 → 390 + categories 13 → 14.
Hot-fix (e9a6743): missing 'import re' in tools/system.py — Patch B regression caught by Wave 4 cold-load.
Hot-fix (b258886): lifted PandaDoc input classes from register() closure scope to module scope. FastMCP get_type_hints couldn't resolve closure annotations and raised InvalidSignature.
Hot-fix (5fbf2b9): workflow_send_quote now polls statusDocument until status leaves document.uploaded. PandaDoc createDocument is async; previous immediate-send hit 409 every time.
Live verification: end-to-end smoke test against real PandaDoc account succeeded. Test doc hWCZTpz6GwY6dNSnHhbHa2 created + sent + email delivered.
Total since v0.8.3: 10 commits, ~70 new tests, ~3500 LOC (mostly auto-generated PandaDoc surface).
pick_up_here: Wave 4 (quote management with e-signatures) is the next strategic item. Operator deciding between PandaDoc (custom MCP) and SignNow (in registry). Once that decision lands, the deterministic quote-generation module ships in ~1 day and the signature integration is another ~1 day.
instructions_for_next_handler: Read coassisted-workspace-ap-roadmap-2026-04-30.md on operator's Desktop for the AP/AR vision.
Read patch-efg-collections-and-cron-2026-05-01.md on operator's Desktop for the Finnn E/F/G patch context.
Bump VERSION in _version.py + pyproject.toml if you ship features.
Append a new entry to HANDOFF_LOG.md before handing off.
Run `make test-fast` and record pass/fail in your log entry.
Commit each spec / patch as a discrete git commit.
